# Synthetic Interval Outputs

This location stores deterministic interval and confidence-band fixtures.

Current stored fixtures cover seeded QARDL block-bootstrap intervals for beta,
gamma, and phi. Source smoke tests also verify QIRF bootstrap band shape,
monotonicity, and seed reproducibility.

TODO: add stored numerical QIRF and forecast interval baselines after interval
policy is finalized for ARDL-family forecasts and published QARDL bootstrap
targets.
